title: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Reports Increased Revenue and Bitcoin Mining in Q3 2023
text: In Q3 2023, TeraWulf reported revenue of $19.0 million, up 22.6% compared to Q2 2023, and self-mined 994 Bitcoin, marking a 9.5% increase over the previous quarter. For the nine months ended September 30, 2023, the company reported net cash used in operating activities of $6.6 million and net cash used in investing activities totaling $53.8 million, while financing activities provided a net cash inflow of $58.7 million. TeraWulf was positioned for continued growth with the expansion of its Lake Mariner facility and a strategic partnership with BITMAIN, focusing on capital-efficient infrastructure development and commitment to zero-carbon energy sources aligned with ESG goals. The earnings call for Q3 2023 was held on November 13, 2023, and the company continued its expansion trajectory with focus on operational efficiency and power economics.
